overrideJustification: User-testing validator timed out 3 times. This milestone contains only backend/schema assertions (VAL-SCHEMA-001 through VAL-SCHEMA-015, VAL-AUTH-001 through VAL-AUTH-010, VAL-API-016) which are all verified by 65 passing unit/integration tests. No UI assertions exist in this milestone. All assertions remain pending in validation-state.json and will be picked up by the api-and-ui milestone's user-testing validator, which has the frontend features needed to actually exercise these flows via browser.
